mapper.select: SELECT h.id, h.title, h.description, h.target_count AS targetCount, IFNULL(hr.count, 0) AS completedCount, CASE WHEN hr.count >= h.target_count THEN TRUE ELSE FALSE END AS completed FROM habit h INNER JOIN habit_user hu ON h.id = hu.habit_id LEFT JOIN habit_record hr ON h.id = hr.habit_id AND hr.user_id = #{userId} AND DATE(hr.record_date) = CURDATE() WHERE hu.user_id = #{userId} AND h.del_flag = '0' AND (h.end_time IS NULL OR h.end_time >= CURDATE()) ORDER BY h.create_time DESC
